name: Power+ Credit Card

domestic: 1 complimentary domestic airport lounge visit per quarter, subject to a minimum spend of ₹20,000 in the previous calendar month.

specialSpendRules.notes: 30X points per ₹150 spent on HPCL fuel (capped at 2400 points/cycle).
30X points per ₹150 spent on grocery and utility bills (capped at 400 points/cycle on combined spends up to ₹2,000).
30X points per ₹150 spent on grocery and utility bills (capped at 400 points/cycle on combined spends up to ₹2,000).

additionalBenefits: 5.0% return value in Reward Points on HPCL fuel spends plus 1.5% as Happy Coins on HP Pay app
5.0% return value on grocery and utility spends
1% fuel surcharge waiver up to ₹200 per statement cycle at HPCL stations
Reward points are valid for 24 months
internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-14.
HPCL fuel co-branded credit card. 30X points per ₹150 spent on HPCL fuel (capped at 2400 points/cycle).
30X points per ₹150 spent on grocery and utility bills (capped at 400 points/cycle on combined spends up to ₹2,000).
3X points per ₹150 spent on other retail and UPI transactions (value: 0.5% return).
Airport lounge access is subject to a spend threshold of ₹20,000 in the previous calendar month.
Annual fee of ₹499 is waived on spending ₹1,50,000 in the preceding anniversary year.
